summary: Ukrainian FPV drones struck a Ukrainian back-end vehicle near Bolshoy Sokolny Island on the Kherson front, and later hit a Ukrainian Armed Forces BUK air defense system in the same area, with geotagged footage confirming the location. Ukrainian operators are setting ambushes for Russian troops on the Pokrovsk axis, and footage shows Russian soldiers being hit by multiple simultaneous FPV strikes, including one hiding behind a tree. Russian forces report Ukrainian drone operators have become increasingly ruthless. On the Russian side, the "Rubikon" Center conducted operations across multiple axes on March 18, 2026, eliminating 110 targets, including Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs and EW systems. Ukrainian FPV pilots are using tactics such as attempting to dismount Russian troops before striking, and a Russian soldier was filmed charging at a Ukrainian FPV drone with a bayonet and being defeated. Additionally, Iranian-backed militias used fiber-optic FPV drones to attack the US Victory Base near Baghdad International Airport.
